summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CPC (Central Production Control) Module. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully functional with all 4 tabs working. Fixed 1 bug: SelectItem empty value error in New Schedule dialog.
seed_data_creation: Test schedules created during testing: PS_202603_0002, PS_202603_0003, PS_202603_0004. Branch capacities: Unit 1 Vedica (500), Unit 2 Trikes (300), Unit 3 TM (400)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CPC Module fully tested. All 4 tabs working: Dashboard (shows pending/in-progress schedules, branch utilization), Schedules (CRUD with auto-allocate), Branch Capacity (edit capacity, view forecast), Suggestions (dispatch lots needing scheduling). Backend APIs exclude MongoDB _id from responses correctly.

cpc_dashboard_api.GET /api/cpc/dashboard: PASS - Returns pending_schedules, in_progress_schedules, todays_planned_quantity, todays_completed_quantity, branch_utilization

branch_capacity_api.GET /api/branches/capacity: PASS - Returns all branch capacities with utilization

production_schedules_api.GET /api/production-schedules: PASS - Returns list of schedules with allocations
production_schedules_api.POST /api/production-schedules: PASS - Creates new schedule with DRAFT status

schedule_suggestions_api.GET /api/cpc/schedule-suggestions: PASS - Returns dispatch lots needing scheduling

integration_workflow.complete_cpc_workflow: PASS - Create schedule -> Auto-allocate -> Verify dashboard

frontend_cpc_ui.page_loads: PASS - CPC page loads with 4 tabs
frontend_cpc_ui.dashboard_tab: PASS - Shows pending schedules, in progress, today's planned/completed, branch utilization
frontend_cpc_ui.schedules_tab: PASS - Shows schedules table with Auto-Allocate and View buttons
frontend_cpc_ui.branch_capacity_tab: PASS - Shows branch cards with capacity, utilization, Edit buttons
frontend_cpc_ui.suggestions_tab: PASS - Shows dispatch lots with Create Schedule button
frontend_cpc_ui.new_schedule_dialog: PASS - Opens with all fields (Dispatch Lot, SKU, Target Qty, Target Date, Priority, Notes)
frontend_cpc_ui.edit_capacity_dialog: PASS - Opens with capacity input field
frontend_cpc_ui.auto_allocate_dialog: PASS - Opens with preferred branches checkboxes
frontend_cpc_ui.schedule_details_view: PASS - Shows allocations table with Start buttons

bugs_fixed.issue: SelectItem with empty string value causing runtime error
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed value='' to value='none' and updated handler to convert 'none' back to empty string
